<a id="llm-frameworks"></a>

### LLM Frameworks

- [1Panel-dev/MaxKB](https://github.com/1Panel-dev/MaxKB) `Python` -- 🔥 MaxKB is an open-source platform for building enterprise-grade agents.  强大易用的开源企业级智能体平台。

## Fediverse & ActivityPub
_Mastodon, Bluesky, ActivityPub servers, and decentralized social networks._

<a id="mastodon-tools"></a>

### Mastodon Tools

- [BNolet/postodon](https://github.com/BNolet/postodon) `Python` -- Postodon is a server that will post to mastodon at a given interval, with each post consisting of an intro and content.

<a id="micropub"></a>

### Micropub Servers

- [Decentralized-Sharing-Working-Group/micropub_client](https://github.com/Decentralized-Sharing-Working-Group/micropub_client) `JavaScript` -- Basic Micropub client in Node.js
- [Taproot/micropub-adapter](https://github.com/Taproot/micropub-adapter) `PHP` -- The easiest way to add micropub support to existing or new applications.
- [aaronpk/OwnYourGram](https://github.com/aaronpk/OwnYourGram) `CSS` -- 📷 Save your Instagram photos to your own website!

<a id="web-framework"></a>

## Web Framework & APIs
_Web servers, HTTP clients, REST APIs, and web standards._

<a id="jamstack"></a>

## Static Site & Jamstack
_Static site generators, JAMstack frameworks, and site optimizers._

- [PataphysicalSociety/soupault](https://github.com/PataphysicalSociety/soupault) `OCaml` -- Static website generator based on HTML element tree rewriting
- [adhocteam/pushup](https://github.com/adhocteam/pushup) `Go` -- Pushup is for making modern, page-oriented web apps in Go
- [appsmithorg/appsmith](https://github.com/appsmithorg/appsmith) `TypeScript` -- Platform to build admin panels, internal tools, and dashboards. Integrates with 25+ databases and any API.
- [decaporg/decap-cms](https://github.com/decaporg/decap-cms) `JavaScript` -- A Git-based CMS for Static Site Generators

<a id="utilities"></a>

## Utilities & Tools
